error.description: Indicates the request cannot be executed without WAUTH authorization.

authorization_details.description: RFC 9396 authorization_details describing the minimum acceptable authorization (requirements template).

wauth_requirements.description: Optional wrapper form. If present, wauth_requirements.authorization_details MUST be identical (semantic equality) to authorization_details.

wauth_binding.description: Per-request binding computed by RP for safe action_hash binding.

happ_challenge.description: Optional HAPP challenge object (opaque to WAUTH).

wauth_server.description: Optional hint about where to obtain a capability (if discovery is not used).
